emphasis: the 7 ordered stages (data loading → preprocessing & grouping → OCR extraction → prepare analysis data → AI analysis → process analysis results → feature engineering)
entry points (CLI scripts, orchestrator, --target / version args)
intermediate storage (in-memory DataFrames, versioned PostgreSQL tables product_raw / product_analysis / product_service)
external dependencies (Google Cloud Vision API, OpenAI GPT-4o mini, DynamoDB ItemKeywords)
the KeywordExtractor module used in Step 5
how versioned tables are produced and activated (relation to TableVersionManager)
schema-evidence pairs the validator can resolve to file:line
skip: tbl_version_manager.py internals — that file is already documented as the `table-manager` agent-docs entry. Reference it as a dependency only, do not re-document.

pages.purpose: Project-scoped agent-docs entry for the 7-stage product DB pipeline orchestrator. Frontmatter-only, conformant to docs/AGENT_DOCS_SCHEMA.md v0.2.

references.note: This is the central orchestrator of the K-Beauty data pipeline. Already-shipped sibling entries: oliveyoung-scraper + bkurly-scraper (upstream data sources via DynamoDB), review-scraper (consumes product_raw output), sentiment-analysis (consumes review output), search-trend-scraper (sibling consumer of versioned tables), ingredient-embeddings (consumes product_analysis output), table-manager (component carved out of THIS SAME repo — utils/tbl_version_manager.py — so list as `related` and depend on it, do not re-document its internals). Cross-link generously via related[] since this is the topology hub.
